one_sentence_purpose: A Terraform provider that lets you manage Discord servers, roles, channels, and permissions as declarative infrastructure code.
target_users: DevOps engineers and Discord community administrators who want reproducible, version-controlled server configurations
visual_metaphors: interlocking puzzle pieces connecting Terraform blocks to Discord channels
a bridge spanning from HCL code to a Discord server
server rack nodes linked by chat bubbles

assets_needed.desc: Wide banner on white background with abstract infrastructure blocks connected by purple lines, project name in bold
Wide banner on dark background with abstract infrastructure blocks connected by purple lines, project name in bold
Square logo on white background with abstract interlocking blocks in purple and indigo
Square logo on dark background with abstract interlocking blocks in purple and indigo
GitHub social preview card with tagline, abstract infrastructure node graph, purple palette
